jp.title: Realtek RTL8127レビュー：7000円台で買える「蟹の10G LAN」カードを検証
jp.description: 去年（2025年）ごろから流通が始まった、Realtek製10G LANチップ「RTL8127」が日本国内でも安く買えるようになりました。謎の中華業者がAmazonで約7000円くらいから売っています。実際に1枚買ってみたので、本当に10 Gbpsを出せるのか、本当に低発熱なのか･･･？ 軽く検証します。

world.title: Brendon McCullum to leave role as England Test coach but continue to lead white-ball sides
world.description: Brendon McCullum gutted to leave Test role; England have lost eight of last 12 Tests, including 4-1 Ashes thrashing and 2-1 defeat to New Zealand; McCullum has just coached England to 4-0 T20I series win over India and top spot in world rankings; England MD Rob Key set to stay on

world.title: Alexander Sorloth explains why he didn't pass to Erling Haaland when Norway had golden chance to establish two-goal lead vs England in World Cup quarter-final tie
world.description: Alexander Sorloth has opened up on his failure to deliver a pass to a wide-open Erling Haaland during Norway's heartbreaking World Cup quarter-final defeat to England. Haaland was clearly in a good position to double his team's lead before half-time, but Sorloth opted to go for goal himself, a moment that proved to be a major turning point in the match.

world.title: If Hanson fades, this four-week stretch will be remembered for the mistakes that brought her down

world.title: Canada's Dabrowski finishes as Wimbledon women's doubles runner-up for 3rd time
world.description: Kristina Mladenovic won a seventh career Grand Slam women's doubles title by teaming up with Guo Hanyu to defeat Canada's Gabriela Dabrowski and Luisa Stefani 6-3, 7-5 in the Wimbledon final Sunday.

world.title: Cricket: 'Of course I'm gutted' - Brendon McCullum sacked as England test coach
world.description: Brendon McCullum has left his role as England's test head coach but will remain in charge of the national white-ball set-up, the England and Wales Cricket Board says.
